news.title: Crypto Clarity Act inches toward Senate hearing as lawmakers weigh legislative trades
news.summary: The White House may be reviewing fresh legislative text, and lawmakers are reportedly weighing offers to banks of other, unrelated provisions for their support.

news.title: DeFi risk management giant Gauntlet sees $380 million exit as OKX crypto campaign ends
news.summary: Gauntlet noted that deposits are now back to same levels before the campaign, and has navigated large capital swings before due to incentive campaign endings, airdrops, and shifts in market conditions...

news.title: Crypto markets – and the American people – deserve clarity
